input.question: Show the average overall course evaluation rating for each professor

payload.question: Show the average overall course evaluation rating for each professor

output.sql:
SELECT
  professor_id AS professor_id,
  professor_name AS professor_name,
  ROUND(AVG(overall_rating), 2) AS avg_overall_rating
FROM course_evaluations
GROUP BY professor_id, professor_name
ORDER BY avg_overall_rating DESC;

visualization.title: Average Overall Course Evaluation by Professor

payload.sql:
SELECT
  professor_id AS professor_id,
  professor_name AS professor_name,
  ROUND(AVG(overall_rating), 2) AS avg_overall_rating
FROM course_evaluations
GROUP BY professor_id, professor_name
ORDER BY avg_overall_rating DESC;
